title: Entity Hide Behavior
description: Allows a mob with the hide component to attempt to move to - and hide at - an owned or nearby POI.

duration.title: Duration
duration.description: Amount of time in seconds that the mob reacts.

poi_type.title: POIType
poi_type.description: Tells the goal what POI type it should be looking for

priority.title: Priority
priority.description: As priority approaches 0, the priority is increased. The higher the priority, the sooner this behavior will be executed as a goal.

speed_multiplier.title: Speed Multiplier
speed_multiplier.description: Movement speed multiplier of the mob when using this goal.

timeout_cooldown.title: Timeout Cooldown
timeout_cooldown.description: The cooldown time in seconds before the goal can be reused after a internal failure or timeout condition.
